name: packettracer-mcp-server
description: Stdio MCP server for Cisco Packet Tracer host operations and ExApp-backed execution

scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc && node --input-type=module -e "import { chmodSync } from 'node:fs'; try { chmodSync('dist/packettracer-exapp-bridge.js', 0o755); } catch {}"
